_law: Data Portability Law — reel history is memory, not documentation. This is a machine-readable data source, not a markdown log.
_note: This file is read by the Thinker when scoring semantic_divergence. It is written after each reel renders and is evaluated. It is never modified retroactively.

reels.title: The Illusion of Motion

perceptual_anchor.description: Monolithic obelisk fracturing under pressure in void — templated, not derived from concept reasoning

reels.production_notes: Phase 0 pipeline proof. Prompts were compiler-generated templates, not derived from concept analysis. Primary symbol was not scored against candidates — obelisk was the engine default. Serves as baseline for measuring 3.0 pipeline improvement.
